options.name: -allBumps
options.description: specifies that all bumps will use the new cell master

options.name: -bumpMasterName
options.description: specifies the name of the cell master

options.name: -bump_name
options.description: change bump master on specified bumps

options.name: -fromBumpMasterName
options.description: specifies the name of the cell master

options.name: -location_type
options.description: {cell_center cell_lowerleft geometry_center geometry_lowerleft} It specifies the location type.

options.name: -netName
options.description: specifies net name bumps connected to which will use the new cell master

options.name: -selected
options.description: change selected bump(s) with new cell master
